BLE operations and scanning demos, app metadata, and build script for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: BLE operations and scanning demos with menu interface and function declarations for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the BLE Demo app, including UUID, version, and company information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with customizable rules and SDK integration.
